text:
effective 10/01/2023
1009 HMDYLS_ADMSN_CD HMDYLS_ADMSN_CD O0110J2A Other: Hemodialysis (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received hemodialysis days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1010 HMDYLS_DSCHRG_CD HMDYLS_DSCHRG_CD O0110J2C Other: Hemodialysis (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received hemodialysis in the last three days of their SNF stay.
